project: Benchmark Gap-Fill: Enterprise NL Codebase Q&A
description: Create 8 NL codebase Q&A tasks in ccb_nlqa targeting enterprise-scale repos. Replaces saturated ccb_repoqa. Tasks require multi-hop reasoning across packages, with weighted checklist scoring.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-arch-001: Envoy HTTP filter chain architecture
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a Q&A task asking the agent to explain how Envoy's HTTP filter chain processes requests, tracing from listener → connection manager → filter chain → router → upstream. Use envoyproxy/envoy repo. Research the repo via Sourcegraph to find the correct packages and key functions, then create the task.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-001/task.toml exists with name=nlqa-arch-001, repo=envoyproxy/envoy, language=cpp, difficulty=hard, time_limit_sec=1200
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-001/instruction.md poses 3-4 specific questions about HTTP filter chain architecture requiring cross-package tracing
instruction.md contains ZERO mentions of Sourcegraph, MCP, or specific tool names
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-001/environment/Dockerfile clones envoyproxy/envoy at a pinned commit SHA
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-001/tests/ground_truth.json has required_findings (5+), file_references (3+), causal_chain (2+), negative_checks (1+)
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-001/tests/test.sh exists (copy shared weighted checklist scorer from benchmarks/templates/)
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json with benchmark=ccb_nlqa
Task added to configs/nlqa_2config.sh TASKS array
userStories.notes: Key Envoy packages: source/common/http/, source/extensions/filters/, source/common/router/. Use Sourcegraph keyword_search to find FilterChainManager, ConnectionManagerImpl, Router. Pin to a recent stable release tag.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-arch-002: Istio Pilot xDS serving architecture
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a Q&A task asking the agent to explain how Istio's Pilot component translates Kubernetes resources into Envoy xDS configuration. Use istio/istio repo.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-002/ has complete task files (task.toml, instruction.md, environment/Dockerfile, tests/test.sh, tests/ground_truth.json)
instruction.md asks about xDS translation pipeline: ServiceEntry → internal model → xDS response
ground_truth.json has 5+ required_findings covering pilot/pkg/xds/, pilot/pkg/model/, pilot/pkg/config/
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and nlqa_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Key Istio packages: pilot/pkg/xds/, pilot/pkg/model/, pilot/pkg/networking/. Use Sourcegraph to find DiscoveryServer, ConfigController.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-arch-003: Terraform plan/apply pipeline architecture
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a Q&A task asking how Terraform's plan command builds a dependency graph, resolves providers, and generates an execution plan. Use hashicorp/terraform repo.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-arch-003/ has complete task files
instruction.md asks about graph builder → provider resolution → diff computation pipeline
ground_truth.json has 5+ required_findings covering internal/command/, internal/terraform/, internal/providers/
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and nlqa_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Key Terraform packages: internal/terraform/context.go, internal/terraform/graph_builder_plan.go, internal/providers/. Search for PlanGraphBuilder, NodeApplyableProvider.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-flow-001 and nlqa-flow-002: Data flow tracing tasks
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want two data-flow tracing tasks: (1) Kafka message lifecycle from producer → broker → consumer in apache/kafka, and (2) Envoy request routing from listener accept → upstream connection in envoyproxy/envoy.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-flow-001/ has complete task files for Kafka message lifecycle
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-flow-002/ has complete task files for Envoy request routing
Each instruction.md asks 'trace the path of X from A to B, identifying every transformation point'
Each ground_truth.json has an ordered causal_chain with 4+ steps
Both tasks registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and nlqa_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Kafka: clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/clients/producer/ → server/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/server/ → clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/clients/consumer/. Envoy: source/server/listener_impl.cc → source/common/http/conn_manager_impl.cc → source/common/router/router.cc → source/common/upstream/.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-flow-003: Argo CD sync reconciliation data flow
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a data flow task asking how Argo CD reconciles desired state (Git) with live state (Kubernetes cluster). Use argoproj/argo-cd repo.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-flow-003/ has complete task files
instruction.md asks about sync reconciliation: Git fetch → manifest generation → diff computation → sync operation
ground_truth.json has 4+ transformation points in causal_chain
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and nlqa_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Argo CD v2.14.21 (commit 206a6eeca). 4 questions: reconciliation triggering/Git fetch, manifest generation/rendering, diff computation, sync execution. Ground truth: 8 findings, 6 file refs, 5 causal chain steps, 2 negative checks.

userStories.title: Create nlqa-debug-001 and nlqa-debug-002: 'Why does this happen?' Q&A tasks
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want two debugging Q&A tasks: (1) VS Code: explain why extension host process crashes don't kill the main window, using microsoft/vscode, and (2) Cilium: explain why eBPF program failures on one node don't affect other nodes' policies, using cilium/cilium.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-debug-001/ has complete task files for VS Code extension host isolation
benchmarks/ccb_nlqa/nlqa-debug-002/ has complete task files for Cilium eBPF fault isolation
Each instruction.md presents a specific behavior observation and asks WHY it works that way
Each ground_truth.json has required root cause mechanism + negative checks (must NOT blame wrong component)
Both tasks registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and nlqa_2config.sh
userStories.notes: VS Code v1.99.3 (17baf841). Cilium v1.17.9 (a2f97aa8). 4 questions each: process isolation, IPC/deployment, crash handling/policy distribution, isolation mechanisms/map scoping. Ground truth: 8 findings, 5 file refs, 2 causal chains, 2 negative checks per task.
